headline: Tom Lee's Small-Cap Granny Shots ETF Reloads: First Solar, Zoom Among 10 New Buys
summary: Tom Lee's GRNJ added First Solar, Zoom and eight other stocks in its latest rebalance as assets under management climbed to $476 million.

headline: Bernstein Initiates Coverage On Carrier Global with Market Perform Rating, Announces Price Target of $75
summary: Bernstein  analyst Varun Govindaraj   initiates coverage on Carrier Global (NYSE:CARR) with a Market Perform rating and announces Price Target of $75.
